request.message: Patch improves the paid mcp-server-audit output with URL parsing, readiness score, tool-specific paid product recommendations, x402 response contract details, catalog metadata, launch plan, risk notes, and richer output_schema. Patch file: https://github.com/kgy7247/proofdeskqa-oobe-agent/blob/main/output/pyrimid-mcp-server-audit-output.patch. Validation: git diff --check, npm install, npm run build all passed in a fresh pyrimid clone.
